---
title: "Stage 02.1 — Doublet Removal (DecontX track)"
subtitle: "iSN snRNA-seq Pipeline"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
    dev: ragg_png
knit: (function(input, ...) rmarkdown::render(input, output_dir = "scDblFinder_output", ...))
params:
  project_root: "/scratch/rmlab/rmlab_shared3/tyron/Rscriptv2/iSN/iSN_claude"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align = "center", dev = "ragg_png")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = params$project_root)
options(knitr.graphics.rel_path = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r load}
out_dir <- file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/02.1_scDblFinder_decontX/scDblFinder_output")
seu <- readRDS(file.path(out_dir, "iSN_decontX_scDblFinder.rds"))
```

## Doublet rate per sample

```{r doublet-rate-table}
db_summary <- seu@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample_group, scDblFinder.class) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = scDblFinder.class, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total = singlet + doublet,
                pct_doublet = round(doublet / total * 100, 1))
knitr::kable(db_summary, caption = "Doublet rate per sample (flag: >15% is unusual)")
```

```{r doublet-rate-flag, results='asis'}
flagged <- db_summary$sample_group[db_summary$pct_doublet > 15]
if (length(flagged) > 0) {
  cat("**Flag:** The following samples have a doublet rate > 15%:", paste(flagged, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("_No samples exceed the 15% doublet rate threshold._\n")
}
```

## Overall doublet rate

```{r overall-rate, results='asis'}
total_cells    <- nrow(seu@meta.data)
total_doublets <- sum(seu@meta.data$scDblFinder.class == "doublet")
overall_pct    <- round(total_doublets / total_cells * 100, 1)
cat(sprintf("**Total cells:** %d | **Doublets:** %d | **Overall doublet rate:** %.1f%%\n",
            total_cells, total_doublets, overall_pct))
```

## nCount_RNA distribution

```{r ncount-hist, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
ggplot(seu@meta.data, aes(x = nCount_RNA)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 200, fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 500, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~sample_group) +
  xlim(0, 20000) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "nCount_RNA distribution per sample", x = "UMI count", y = "Count")
```

## QC by doublet class

```{r qc-by-class, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
VlnPlot(seu, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA"),
        group.by = "scDblFinder.class", pt.size = 0.01, ncol = 2)
```

## QC by sample

```{r qc-by-sample, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
VlnPlot(seu, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA"),
        group.by = "sample_group", pt.size = 0.01, ncol = 2) &
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## scDblFinder score distribution

```{r score-dist, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
ggplot(seu@meta.data, aes(x = scDblFinder.score, fill = scDblFinder.class)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, alpha = 0.6, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(singlet = "steelblue", doublet = "tomato")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "scDblFinder score distribution", x = "Score", y = "Count", fill = "Class")
```

## Session info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
